calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-23-2024 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-18-2024 Continued To Sep-18-24 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEFAULT HEARING (PROVE UP)
Off Calendar Jul-31-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, being set for hearing on Plaintiff's request for entry of default judgment.

Dept. 505; Judge Michelle Tong; Clerk N Webb; Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 11:11 am and concluding at 11:34 am.

Plaintiff Associated Industries Insurance Company Inc. is represented by Timothy Aires, Esq.
Defendant Tariq Ezzat Ayyad not appearing.

Plaintiff presents summary of facts, claims and an offer of proof.

MILDRED HELGESON is sworn to testify on behalf of Plaintiff and testifies.

Plaintiff submits the following exhibits for the Court's review:
Exhibit 1: Invoice (1); labled exhibit B of the Declaration of James Buller.

The matter is submitted.

By the statements made by Plaintiff and its counsel, documents filed, and evidence presented, the Court finds that Plaintiff has provided sufficient evidence proving each element of the complaint.

Good cause appearing, the Court RULES in favor of Plaintiff Associated Industries Insurance Company Inc., and against Defendant Tariq Ezzat Ayyad, as follows:

1. Damages: $27,966.30
2. Prejudgment Interest: $0
3. Costs: $685.00

TOTAL JUDGMENT: $28,651.30

Proposed judgment signed and filed. (D505)

DEFAULT HEARING (PROVE UP)
Off Calendar Jun-07-2024 Continued To Jul-31-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 505

DEFAULT HEARING (PROVE UP)
Off Calendar May-09-2024 Continued To Jun-07-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 505

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-15-2024 Continued To Aug-14-24 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
